content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape: NIFTY -0.38%, Bank Nifty -1.16%, PSU Banks -2.50% weak, but IT +1.43% and pockets of strength in Chemicals, Capital Goods, Pharma post-Q4 results. VIX +1.5% to 16.87 reflects elevated nervousness. Book is well-positioned with 13 holdings already; deployment at 61% with 3 pending limit orders. Late session (14:47, 42 min to close) — focus on locking gains via SL trails and avoiding fresh CNC entries this late.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+11% winner. Stored SL 1069.77 sits above 1060 — wait, 1069.77 > 1060 means I'd be loosening. Keeping stored SL at 1069.77 actually — checking: stored 1069.77, proposed 1060 is BELOW stored, that's a loosening which guardrails reject. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Correction from prior decision: stored SL 1069.77 already sits ~2.1% below CMP 1083.60, locking in ~+8.7% gain. Tighter would breach the 1% trail-gap floor (Rule (c)). HOLD; reassess on next move higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge bouncing +1.66% today on Iran tensions. -0.7% from entry, well within SL 121. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY rejected — stored SL already 820 (breakeven), no change warranted at current +1.7% level. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Correction: stored SL already at entry 820 (breakeven). +1.7% gain, CMP 834. Trail-gap floor would require SL ≤ 825.66 (1% below CMP); stored 820 is fine. HOLD until next move higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+8.7% winner after Q4 +30% revenue beat. CMP 1366.20, current SL 1341.52. Trailing SL up to 1352 (1.04% below CMP, satisfies 1% gap floor) locks in ~+7.4% gain. Tightening from 1341.52 to 1352 — valid tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, CMP 3048.60 vs SL 3000. Defense rallied today, position barely up. SL 3000 is 1.6% below CMP, within trail-gap rules. Hold — too early to trail aggressively given midday fade off 3129 high."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+3.9% winner. CMP 838 vs stored SL 825 (1.55% below CMP, satisfies 1% gap). Stored SL already above entry 806 — gain locked. Hold; trail more aggressively only on next leg up."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, -0.6%, CMP 1483 vs SL 1465. Q4 PAT +37%, 310 bps margin expansion, dividend Rs 11.5 — thesis intact. SL absorbs normal noise; respect it (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, CMP 1607 vs SL 1580. Q4 turnaround +317% PAT, biotech +126%. Thesis intact, recent entry, give it room to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, CMP 2790 vs SL 2755. Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 +46.7%, refrigerant capex. Recent entry, hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, CMP 9093 vs SL 9020. Record Q4, 30% W&C growth, Rs 47 div. Just entered, give it room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, CMP 1987 vs SL 1955. Q4 PAT -17% on Labour Codes one-time, but defence +46% YoY and Rs 10,961 cr order book intact. NA Class 8 truck headwind a watchpoint but not breaking thesis. Respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, CMP 364.35 vs SL 354. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +32%, Macquarie TP 415. Thesis intact, recent entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, CMP 10716 vs SL 10440. Q4 PAT +34% record, Rs 12000 buyback floor (16% above CMP) provides technical support. Hold; SL gives 2.6% room."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+11% winner; stored SL 1069.77 already locks ~+8.7%. Cannot tighten without breaching 1% trail-gap floor (CMP 1083.60). Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge, intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven 820; +1.7%, room to run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1341.52 to 1352 to lock in +7.4% gain (1.04% below CMP, within trail-gap floor)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position barely up; SL 3000 absorbs faded high. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 already above entry 806; +3.9% gain. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry, intact thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry, turnaround intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry, FY26 +46.7% PAT."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry, record Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative print absorbed by defence book; respect SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recent entry, Q4 strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12000 floor supports; respect SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Late session (14:47, 42 min to close) — no fresh CNC entries despite strong watchlist (POLYCAB +9%, SRF +10.6%, PIDILITIND +8.7%, CAMS +5%, WOCKPHARMA +4.4%, COFORGE +17%) because: (1) all best-in-class names in those themes ALREADY HELD in book (PIDILITIND, SRF, POLYCAB, CAMS, WOCKPHARMA, COFORGE all held). (2) Three pending limit orders (LAURUSLABS, DABUR, HFCL) still open. (3) Adding more would breach BFSI/Chemicals/Capital Goods cluster weights and push deployed past 80% soft target. (4) Other names (GABRIEL, NUVAMA, TATATECH, NBCC, FINCABLES, RAMCOCEM, THERMAX, PERSISTENT, APOLLOTYRE) are either chasing extended moves at session-high or have pending binary events (APOLLOTYRE Q4 May 14). Explicit per-name reject rationale (Rule 18): GABRIEL/NUVAMA/TATATECH — chase risk on extended intraday moves, no edge entering at 14:47; NBCC/FINCABLES — Capital Goods cluster cap with POLYCAB+BHARATFORG+GRSE already; RAMCOCEM/THERMAX/PERSISTENT — late-session entries; APOLLOTYRE — Q4 binary May 14 (Rule 11, 3 sessions away)."
  ,
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 61% with 3 pending orders that will push toward 75-80% if filled — well within soft target. Book heavily concentrated in Q4 winners: 9 of 13 holdings reported strong Q4 with bullish modifiers in research. Today is a profit-locking day, not an admission day. CANCEL HFCL pending order — placed 58 hours ago, MIS LIMIT, completely stale and shouldn't carry over to tomorrow as MIS anyway. Letting LAURUSLABS and DABUR limits ride; both still in range and thesis intact."
}
